description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a dark green and gray camouflage paint scheme, featuring roundels and insignia typical of the Royal Air Force. The fuselage is streamlined with a sharply pointed nose cone and a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front. The wings are mid-mounted, swept back, and equipped with underwing pylons for external stores or fuel tanks. The tail section includes a single tall vertical stabilizer with a distinctive insignia and a horizontal stabilizer mounted low. The aircraft is powered by twin jet engines located at the rear, with prominent exhaust nozzles visible. The landing gear is deployed, showing a tricycle configuration with two main wheels and a single nose wheel.
description: A military jet aircraft with green and gray camouflage, swept mid-mounted wings, twin rear jet engines, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, swept wings, and deployed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear oblique view highlighting the twin jet engine exhausts, swept wings, and vertical stabilizer with insignia.
description_view_2: Front oblique view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, underwing pylons, and landing gear.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the sharp nose cone, cockpit, and the symmetry of the swept wings and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets and a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and low-mounted horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy.
